name: migration-planner
description: Plan a system migration without losing your mind. Map the current system, design the data pipeline, plan integrations, assess risks, and produce a migration checklist with rollback strategy.

config.instruction: Map the current system: architecture, data stores, integrations, APIs, dependencies, and traffic patterns. Identify what needs to migrate and what can stay.
Design the data migration pipeline: extract from source, transform to target schema, load into new system. Include validation checksums, incremental sync strategy, and rollback procedure.
Plan how each integration point migrates: API compatibility layer, redirect strategy, client notification timeline, and deprecation schedule for old endpoints.
Assess migration risks: data loss, downtime, integration failures, performance regression, rollback complexity. Rate each risk and define mitigation strategies.

Build the migration checklist: pre-migration validation, migration steps in order, verification queries, rollback triggers and procedure, post-migration monitoring, and stakeholder communication plan.
